title: Check If a String Is a Valid Sequence from Root to Leaves Path in a Binary Tree
titleCn: 判断给定的序列是否是二叉树从根到叶的路径

detail.title: Check If a String Is a Valid Sequence from Root to Leaves Path in a Binary Tree
hints: Depth-first search (DFS) with the parameters: current node in the binary tree and current position in the array of integers.
When reaching at final position check if it is a leaf node.
